methods.method_name: preparation of agar plate with 2% agar (w/v) and 0.04% F/2 (v/v) media and autoclaved seawater
transfer from agar plate to 250 mL flask with 100 mL of F/2 enriched culture media and antibiotics
use of antibiotics solution (penicillin, streptomycin, neomycin) at specific doses
transfer from antibiotic mixed media to 250 mL flask with 100 mL media
streaking on bacto-agar media for observation of bacteria presence
